name: zenmap
title: zenmap
description:
The Network Mapper Front End
Zenmap is an Nmap frontend. It is meant to be useful for advanced users
and to make Nmap easy to use by beginners. It was originally derived
from Umit, an Nmap GUI created as part of the Google Summer of Code.

commands.name: zenmap
commands.description: Graphical Nmap frontend and results viewer

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use zenmap because The Network Mapper Front End.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use zenmap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `zenmap [options] [results file]` as documented upstream for zenmap.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair zenmap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `zenmap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
